# ![](Solway-cattle.png)

# PhD research

## Thesis

*Moving With the Times: mobility of people and their animals in Neolithic and Bronze Age Lincolnshire and the Fens*

## Supervisors

Professor Hannah O'Regan (University of Nottingham)

Professor Oliver Harris (University of Leicester)

## Details

[Research](research.qmd)

[Publications](publications.qmd)

[About](about.qmd)
